block.text: The guards are not prepared to fight an invisible opponent. Normally crack troops, their SKILL is low for this fight because of their surprise. Fight them one at a time: First GUARD SKILL 5 STAMINA 8 Second GUARD SKILL 4 STAMINA 9 Because Of your Cloak, you can Escape. if need be, without taking a wound. If you grab the sword and Escape, turn to 296. If you defeat the guards, Turn to 334.

choice.text: If you grab the sword and Escape.
